input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# Check Feb 14 for key headlines
fname = 'articles/2026/02/14/articles.jsonl'
kws = ['pakistan', 't20', 'cricket', 'storm nils', 'ronda rousey', 'benfica', 'vinicius', 'state of the union', 'sotu', 'democratic response', 'doge', 'deepfake', 'dutch court', 'iranian', 'hezbollah', 'ice hockey', 'medal', 'winter olym', 'sudan market', 'sudan drone', 'mosque', 'bangladesh', 'france ambassador']
with open(fname) as f:
    for line in f:
        art = json.loads(line)
        title = (art.get('title','') or '').lower()
        for kw in kws:
            if kw in title:
                print(f'[{kw}] {(art.get(\"title\",\"\") or \"\")[:120]}')
                break
" 2>/dev/null | head -50
